script_text: Words are not all alone. They connect to other words.
Some words are opposites. Others mean almost the same thing.
Opposites are words that mean very different things.
Hot and cold. Big and small. Fast and slow.
What is the opposite of hot? Cold!
Some words mean almost the same thing.
Happy. Glad. Cheerful. All feel about the same!
We call those same family words!
Ask, is this word the opposite, or is it close in meaning?
Now you are ready to connect words!
